caption: The video features an older man with white hair and a beard, wearing glasses and a dark jacket with a fur-lined collar. He is seated outdoors, with a lush green hedge serving as the backdrop. The man appears to be engaged in a conversation or monologue, as he speaks and occasionally looks down, possibly reading from notes or reflecting on his words. His expression is thoughtful and composed, suggesting that he is discussing a topic of significance or sharing personal insights. The setting is calm and natural, adding a serene atmosphere to the scene.
